arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta issues new challenge to Arsenal stars - and it starts against Chelsea
arts.sum: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta has issued a new challenge to his Arsenal stars after seeing them fall 15 points behind Premier League leaders Liverpool

arts.ttl: New light shed on Arsenal star Ben White's England exile with 'very brave' statement
arts.sum: Arsenal defender Ben White has not been included in the latest England squad by new boss Thomas Tuchel and hasn't played for the Three Lions since leaving the 2022 World Cup early

arts.ttl: England: Thomas Tuchel admits doubts over Reece James fitness as he disagrees with Enzo Maresca position shift
arts.sum: James has returned to the England squad for the first time in two years

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta hails 'very brave' Ben White as reason for Arsenal star's England exile is revealed
arts.sum: The Arsenal defender is back in contention for the England national team having not featured since late 2022

arts.ttl: Bukayo Saka injury: Mikel Arteta reveals plan as Arsenal star targets Real Madrid showdown
arts.sum: Gunners winger is making good progress as he targets a return from a hamstring injury in the near future

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta defends Ben White's decision to REJECT England under Gareth Southgate - after Thomas Tuchel opened the door to his return
arts.sum: ISAAN KHAN: White has not played for his country since dropping out of England's Qatar World Cup camp in November 2022 because of 'personal reasons', but could return under Tuchel.

arts.ttl: Football news: Arsenal consider major change as Chelsea look at £60m double transfer
arts.sum: The Premier League returns with Manchester City fighting European rivals and Arsenal taking on a Chelsea side who are also in the hunt for the Champions League spots despite growing unrest at Stamford Bridge

arts.ttl: Chelsea complete hijack as Arsenal prioritise €60m superstar
arts.sum: Plus, Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta made a huge demand and Man Utd received an unwelcome update on Viktor Gyokeres . In Quenda, Chelsea have managed to sign Man Utd's top target for the summer.

arts.ttl: Max Dowman gets huge Arsenal chance before Chelsea clash as latest Mikel Arteta decision emerges
arts.sum: Arsenal registered Dowman in their under-15s squad for the start of this season. Despite only turning 15 on New Year's Eve, the midfielder is now a fully-fledged part of Arsenal's under-18s, even captaining the team on Tuesday when they won 3-2 against Chelsea at Cobham.

arts.ttl: Pedro Neto sends Chelsea three-word message after Conference League triumph
arts.sum: At Stamford Bridge on Thursday night, they secured their place in the quarter-finals as Kiernan Dewsbury-Hall scored the only goal of the game in the second half to put the result beyond doubt. Chelsea winger Pedro Neto has sent a three-word message following their 3-1 aggregate win over FC Copenhagen in the UEFA Europa Conference League round of 16.
